note.summary: DOWN_STRONG signals (n=64, wr=0.5938) and range_bottom entries (n=33, wr=0.7879) show confirmed positive EV and pnl after costs with n>=8; lower_wick_rejection and dead-volume states also appear profitable while UP and short-ttc buckets remain loss-making. Overall sample pnl is still negative due to UP and <60s trades dragging results despite positive avg_ev_after_cost across most buckets. Sample size remains modest so selectivity on DOWN + favorable range/candle states is the clearest edge.
warnings: Total settled n=115 still modest; many buckets near n=8-20 threshold so overfitting risk high
UP direction and short-hold trades consistently destroy pnl
avg_ev positive but realized pnl negative indicates cost or slippage drag not fully captured
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available
focus_next: Track DOWN_STRONG + range_bottom + lower_wick intersections for confirmation
Monitor if >=240s and dead-volume filters continue to add edge as n grows
Ignore or deprioritize all UP and <60s buckets until n>30 and wr sustainably above breakeven

history.summary: DOWN signals (esp. history.summary: DOWN signals (esp. STRONG/WEAK, n=63 total) show confirmed edge with wr 0.58-0.60, positive EV ~0.118 after costs and small positive pnl; range_bottom (n=23, wr 0.739, pnl +34), lower_wick_rejection (n=11), bearish_aligned mtf (n=27), dead/active volume, >=240s/60-120s ttc, and na zscore buckets meet criteria for confirmed profitability while UP and short-ttc buckets remain negative. DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG n=46 wr=0.587 and DOWN_WEAK n=20 wr=0.6) show confirmed positive EV (~0.117) and net pnl after 88 settled trades; UP signals remain unprofitable. Range_bottom, dead/active volume, bearish_aligned MTF, and ttc>=120s buckets meet confirmation thresholds (n>=8, wr>breakeven, +EV); most other slices are noise or under-sampled.

With 93 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=51, WR 60.8%) and range_bottom entries (n=27, WR 74.1%) show confirmed positive EV after costs with sufficient samples; DOWN overall outperforms UP materially while short-hold (<60s) and volume-spike buckets remain clearly negative. Most other buckets are still too small or mixed to confirm. Sample remains modest so selectivity on DOWN + favorable regime combinations is the only emerging edge.

DOWN_STRONG/DOWN_WEAK signals in trending regimes with ttc>=120s, range_bottom, lower_wick_rejection, bearish_aligned, dead/active volume, and v4 indicator show win-rates 0.60-0.75 above breakeven with positive EV after costs and n>=20; these are confirmed. UP signals, volume_spike, range_top, bull_close_near_high, and most z-score extremes remain unprofitable or noisy with negative realized pnl despite positive avg_ev. Overall sample of 95 is still small and selective rejection rate extremely high.

With 97 settled trades, DOWN signals (esp. DOWN_STRONG) and a handful of regime buckets show modestly positive realized PnL and win-rates above 0.55-0.60, while UP and most other slices remain negative or too small; avg_ev_after_cost stays positive across buckets but has not yet translated into consistent net profitability. No buckets meet strict confirmation criteria of confidently beating their own breakeven win-rate with material positive EV and n>>50. Sample remains too limited and noisy for live deployment.

history.summary: DOWN_STRONG, range_bottom, lower_wick_rejection, dead volume, and bearish_aligned buckets now show confirmed positive EV with n>=13, win-rates 0.57-0.77 above breakeven, and net positive realized pnl after costs; most other regimes remain noise with negative aggregate pnl of -33.88 USD across 100 trades. UP direction and short ttc (<60s) buckets are clear underperformers. No prior analysis provided so no changes tracked yet.

headlines: BTC drops to ~$62k amid $717M+ liquidations and Nasdaq/tech selloff
Bitcoin ETFs see net outflows (~$68M reported) despite some Ark/Fidelity inflows
Ongoing leverage flush and macro risk-off pressure (Fed hawkish, ETF redemptions)

note.summary: 373 settled trades, 52.3% win rate, -$94 PnL, profit factor 0.84. No directional edge: TradingView signal hit rate 53.9% vs 42.1% baseline is noise (n=115). DOWN trades (58.8% win, n=85) slightly better than UP (40% win, n=30), but losses exceed wins ($3.97 avg loss vs $3.04 avg win). Execution gate rejecting 48 negative-EV trades shows gate is working, but not enough.
